name: DRIP COFFEE AND BAKED GOODS LLC

violations.description: Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. Knives have "decorative" coating on blade. Unable to determine whether considered food safe.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Ensure reach in coolers and freezer are provided with internal thermometers located in a conspicuous location. Stem thermometer needed for taking product temperatures. Ensure thermometer has 0-220 degrees F. capability.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Unable to locate test strips for chemical sanitizer.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Small ice bin not provided with indirect connection to sewer lines. Per employees, ice bin no longer used.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors are sticky and need cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Store cleaning chemicals away from food service related items in storage rooms.
